name: qwen3-vl-4b-int4-cpu-vision-eval
command: cd builtin && python optimize.py --config-dir cpu_and_mobile --device cpu && python ../../.github/scripts/run_vision_eval.py --model-path cpu_and_mobile/models --limit 100 --device cpu

name: qwen3-vl-4b-int4-cuda-vision-eval
command: cd builtin && python optimize.py --config-dir cuda --device gpu && python ../../.github/scripts/run_vision_eval.py --model-path cuda/models --limit 200 --device gpu
